title: Cyrsed Mod: Backrooms
description: A Backrooms extension to the Cyrsed Mod
body:
# What is Cyrsed Mod?

Cyrsed Mod is the base horror mod foundation for the Backrooms extension. And If you are a modder, you can actually freely make an extension of it!

# What is in Cyrsed Mod: Backrooms?

Cyrsed Mod: Backrooms adds the Backrooms to Minecraft. To enter the backrooms you can enter the backrooms in two different ways:
- Use the command /enterthebackrooms
- Noclip by suffocating in sand, gravel, or any gravity block

## What is there so far?
This Cyrsed Mod extension has one functional level. That level is "Level 0" it is the first level you enter when you get into the backrooms. The entity spawnable in "Level 0" is Bacteria. Bacteria is a long black figure looking similar to a short enderman with disfigured proportions. Bacterias behavior consists of walking around, chasing the player, and eventually despawning.


_*Note this is a very experimental mod and could be canceled and ended immediately if something goes wrong. Your worlds can become corrupt at any moment if you are in a beta or alpha version of the mod_
